hints.analytics: See how many people visited your page
hints.portfolio: Customize your page layout, text, and design
hints.navigation: Edit the links shown at the top of your page
hints.hero: Edit your main headline and intro text
hints.about: Write about yourself and list your skills
hints.categories: Create and organize groups for your work
hints.projects: Add and manage individual items in each section
hints.contactInfo: Set up how visitors can reach you
hints.footer: Edit the text at the very bottom of your page
hints.loadingScreen: Customize the animation visitors see first
hints.appearance: Change your page colors, fonts, and style
hints.resume: Upload and manage your resume or CV
hints.accountSettings: Change your name, username, password, and domain
hints.planBilling: Manage your plan and payment details
hints.manageUsers: View and manage all registered users

analytics.title: Visitor Stats
analytics.subscribeDesc: Subscribe for $1/month to publish and share your page with the world.

accountSettings.title: My Account
accountSettings.usernameWarning: ⚠ Changing your username will change your page link.
accountSettings.customDomainDesc: Connect your own domain to your portfolio. Visitors will see your portfolio at your custom domain.
accountSettings.dnsDesc: Go to your domain registrar and add one of these DNS records:
accountSettings.wwwNote: Adding the www record ensures visitors who type www.yourdomain.com are automatically redirected.
accountSettings.dnsPropagation: DNS changes can take up to 24–48 hours to propagate.
accountSettings.sslReady: SSL certificate issued! Your domain is ready.
accountSettings.oauthPassword: Your account uses Google sign-in. Password change is not available.
accountSettings.passwordMinError: New password must be at least 8 characters
accountSettings.dangerDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
accountSettings.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete your account, page, sections, content, stats, and all settings. This cannot be undone.

hero.title: Welcome Banner
hero.headline: Main Title
hero.headlineHint: The big text visitors see first when they open your page
hero.subtextHint: A brief line below your main title
hero.primaryCtaHint: The first button visitors see — usually links to your work
hero.secondaryCtaHint: The second button — usually links to contact

about.title: About Me
about.sectionHeadingHint: The heading shown above your About section
about.aboutTextHint: Tell your visitors about yourself — who you are, what you do
about.paragraphHint: Supports multiple paragraphs. Use line breaks to separate.
about.skillsHint: List your key skills — they appear as small labels on your page

navbar.title: Top Menu
navbar.stickyBgHint: Background color when the menu sticks to the top as visitors scroll down
navbar.hamburgerHint: Color of the menu icon on phones and tablets
navbar.navLinksHint: The clickable links shown in the top menu — visitors use these to jump to different parts of your page
navbar.noLinks: No menu links yet. Click + to add one.
navbar.enterLabel: Please enter text for the link.
navbar.selectTargetError: Please select where this link should go.

contact.title: Contact Details
contact.contactSectionHint: The title and subtitle shown above your contact links
contact.contactSubtitlePlaceholder: I'd love to hear from you
contact.contactLinksHint: Add your email, phone, social media, and other links so visitors can reach you

footer.title: Page Bottom
footer.footerTextHint: The text displayed at the very bottom of your page
footer.footerDisplayHint: Displayed at the bottom of your page

loadingScreen.title: Intro Animation
loadingScreen.showToggle: Show intro animation when page is visited
loadingScreen.showToggleHint: When off, your page loads directly without the intro animation.
loadingScreen.heading: Heading
loadingScreen.headingHint: The main text shown during the intro animation
loadingScreen.subtitle: Subtitle
loadingScreen.bgHint: Leave empty to use the global background color.
loadingScreen.durationHint: How long the intro animation is shown before revealing your page.

appearance.title: Colors & Fonts
appearance.siteTitleHint: Shown in the browser tab and search results
appearance.colorPaletteHint: These are the default colors used across your entire page. Individual sections can override them.
appearance.gridColorHint: Background grid overlay color. Use rgba for transparency.
appearance.fontsHint: These fonts apply across your entire page. Individual elements can override them.
appearance.faviconHint: Small icon shown in the browser tab
appearance.ogImageHint: Image shown when your page link is shared on social media

sections.title: Sections
sections.titleHint: Sections are groups that organize your work — like "Web Design", "Photography", or "Music"
sections.noSections: No sections yet. Click + to create your first one.
sections.sectionNameHint: The name of this group (e.g. "Web Design")
sections.sectionLabelHint: Short label shown above the section title on your page
sections.sectionSubtitleHint: A brief description shown below the section name
sections.sectionSubtitlePlaceholder: e.g. Projects I've worked on recently

sectionsContent.title: My Work
sectionsContent.titleHint: Add and manage individual items in each section — like projects, designs, or case studies
sectionsContent.itemTitleHint: The name of this item (e.g. "Company Website Redesign")
sectionsContent.descriptionHint: A brief summary shown on the card
sectionsContent.contentTypeHint: Choose what kind of item this is
sectionsContent.tagsHint: Keywords that describe this item — shown as small labels
sectionsContent.coverImageHint: Main image shown on the card
sectionsContent.liveUrlHint: Link to the live project (opens in a new tab)
sectionsContent.repoUrlHint: Link to the source code or repository
sectionsContent.codeContentHint: Paste your code here to display it on the card
sectionsContent.codeLanguageHint: Select the language for syntax highlighting
sectionsContent.longDescriptionPlaceholder: Write a detailed description for the item's dedicated page...
sectionsContent.longDescriptionHint: This text will be shown on the item's dedicated page — not on the card
sectionsContent.duplicateTitle: An item with this name already exists. Please choose a different title.

billing.title: Plan & Billing
billing.freeAccessDesc: An admin has granted you full access. No payment required.
billing.proDesc: You've made a one-time payment. Your access never expires.
billing.freePlanDesc: You can build and edit your portfolio, but it won't be publicly visible until you activate your plan.
billing.payOnce: Pay once. Lifetime access. No recurring charges.
billing.securePayment: Secure payment via PayPal. One-time charge of $5.00 USD.
billing.unlockDownloadsDesc: Activate your plan to download PDF, DOCX, and JSON exports.

resume.title: Resume Builder
resume.dataIncomplete: Resume data incomplete — please fill in at least one section
resume.profSummaryHint: tip: write in first person for AI tools
resume.summaryPlaceholder: Results-driven developer with X years of experience in...
